case_title: TASHI TSERING VS. HENRY WRIGLEY III

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSERING, TASHI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WRIGLEY III, HENRY THE VIDEO EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY DEFENDANT SHOWS THAT PLAINTIFF PULLED OUT OF HIS PARKING SPACE AND INTO A TRAVEL LANE AFTER DEFENDANT HAD COMPLETED HIS TURN OUT OF THE GARAGE AND WAS ALREADY IN THE TRAVEL LANE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,060.11 FILED BY TSERING, TASHI AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGLEY III, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $65.00 - SERVED AUG-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGLEY III, HENRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF TASHI TSERING IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY TIBETAN NON COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER JAMPA LMAWANG. CLERK R. SAHATJIAN ADMINISTERED INTERPRETER'S OATH TO MR. JAMPA LAMWANG. DEFENDANT HENRY WRIGLEY III IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS FILED UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF TO CURE UNTIMELINESS. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
